caption: A man wearing glasses, a white button-down shirt with suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, textured wig speaks during a podcast recording. He wears large black headphones and sits before a professional microphone. In the background, a wall is decorated with various framed photographs and clothing items, including a yellow "LEE" branded shirt and a white mannequin. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the man, featuring a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, but his facial expression shifts slightly while he continues speaking, with his mouth opening and closing across the frames. The lighting and background elements remain static throughout the clip.
